message:
test(core): add property-based tests for expected-loss policy controller (ft-2p9cb.4.3.3)

10 proptests: distribution sum, action counts sum, healthy→Hold,
critical→Shed, critical floor enforced, reset restores, action/state/
degradation serde, expected loss nonneg. All 201 proptests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
